title: Platform Control
description: A platform control in the control catalog (03-catalogs/controls/). A control defines WHAT must be satisfied — not how. Implementation detail belongs in bindings; policy code belongs in policies.

id.description: Stable control identifier. Format: {DOMAIN}-{NNN}. Never changes once assigned.

title.description: Short imperative statement in the form '[Subject] must [condition]'.

domain.description: Control domain code from 02-taxonomy/control-domains.yaml. Must match the directory under 03-catalogs/controls/.

priority.description: P1: critical, no exceptions without platform-owner waiver. P2: high. P3: medium. P4: low/informational.

severity.description: Severity of a control failure — the impact if this control is not satisfied.

statement.description: Normative statement of the control requirement. Must use 'must', not 'should'.

rationale.description: Explanation of why this control exists and what risk it prevents or detects.

clause.description: Specific clause within the standard. Use [PLACEHOLDER: ...] if unresearched.

mapped_standards.description: Standards providing provenance. At least one required for lifecycle_status: active.

implementation_expectations.description: Plain-language description of what a compliant implementation looks like. Not a binding.

type.description: Short identifier for the evidence type. Must match a value in 08-evidence/evidence-types.yaml.

failure_behavior.description: Default consequence of a failing assessment for this control.

failure_applies_to.description: Gates where failure_behavior applies. If absent, applies to all gates at which this control is assessed.

condition.description: Boolean expression against compliance manifest fields.

adr_ids.description: ADR IDs providing platform-decision provenance for this control.
